positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for seasons_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    summer != sK0).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    favorite_season(emma,summer)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    emma != james).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    fall != winter).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    summer != fall).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    ~favorite_season(james,summer)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    summer != winter).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    favorite_season(mia,sK0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    spring != fall).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    spring != winter).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    mia != james).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    spring != summer).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    emma != mia).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define season(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define wants_long_vacation(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define student(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
